analysis.scene_description: A busy city street during a heavy rainstorm, with traffic congestion and a large overpass above. The weather is visibly rainy, and the scene appears to be in a densely populated urban area.

objects.label: traffic light
objects.description: A red traffic light is illuminated on a pole, indicating stop for vehicles.

objects.label: overpass
objects.description: A large concrete overpass spans across the top of the image.

objects.label: buildings
objects.description: A multi-story building with a sign that reads 'MOUSE' is visible in the background.

objects.label: vehicles
objects.description: A dense line of cars, buses, and a truck are stopped in traffic, all appearing wet and obscured by rain.

objects.label: trees
objects.description: Several trees are visible on the right side of the image, their leaves blurred by the rain.

objects.label: road signs
objects.description: A triangular warning sign with a yellow triangle and a black border is visible on the left.

people.description: A person is visible on the far left edge of the image, partially obscured by the traffic and the overpass.

analysis.notable_details: The scene is characterized by heavy rainfall, causing the vehicles and surroundings to be wet and the visibility to be low. The traffic is heavily congested, with many vehicles stopped. The overpass and the building in the background are prominent features of the urban environment.
